content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.8 WARN — LoginView.swift only implements GoogleSignInButton (App/LoginView.swift:11-14) as the primary account sign-in, with no ASAuthorizationAppleID equivalent, and no exempt pattern (enterprise/education account, or company-only auth) applies since this is a consumer recipe app.
Pierre: Apple requires apps offering third-party social login (Google, Facebook, etc.) for primary account setup to also offer Sign in with Apple as an equivalent, privacy-preserving option. RecipeBox's LoginView only offers Google sign-in and the marketing copy even advertises "One-tap Google sign-in" as the sole method, with no fallback and no qualifying exemption. Add a Sign in with Apple button alongside Google sign-in before submission, or this will very likely trigger a 4.8 rejection.
